violations.text: Thermometer was lacking in the 2-door reach-in unit. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Spare thermometer was located and placed in this unit during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

Utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) have successfully completed an approved course in food safety management. Employee(s) must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager(s). New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service call placed. Dishwasher may be used to wash and rinse equipment/utensils. Sanitizing must be done using one bay of the 2-bay sink. Single-use paper/plastic dishes and utensils are to be used for residents. Dishwasher cannot be used to sanitize until it is serviced and has proper sanitizing concentration of chlorine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

Ice machine observed in poor repair. Tape observed on the inside of the machine holding a piece in place. Tape is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Tape was removed during inspection. Ice machine must be properly repaired/replaced. In addition, door gasket of the 2-door lowboy observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and 2-door lowboy unit have an accumulation dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. Tiles are cracked and grout has receded well below the tile level. Floor is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Floor must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Wood is used under the ice machine. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2-door lowboy gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023

The flooring in part of the kitchen is in poor repair. Some of the tiles are cracked and there are areas where the grout has receded well below tile level. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
